title: DMV Mod
description: a mod with stuff and people from the DMV SMP
body:
##  DMV Mod, a mod with stuff from the dmv! including

- Qtytan block - does nothing
- DMV Block - plays a sound when clicked
- Goober Block -does nothing
- Goof Block - do nothing
- Silvern block - does nothing
- Yap Block - does nothing
- thing - does nothing
- tytan - does nothing
- wheel - does nothing
- wizard **>:(** - can be used as fuel
- brybry **:D** -cool, does nothing
- wizard mob, does nothing yet and is only spawnable with commands
- Life is a Mystery music disc - plays Life is a Mystery by Mr. Mystery
